cells.desired_definition: Count of distinct dedicated emergency departments under 42 CFR 489.24(b), including qualifying on-campus and off-campus departments or facilities, within one approved current product-system roster and common period
cells.finding: Neither source enumerates dedicated emergency departments, and current West Grove membership and the Union source-period boundary remain unresolved.

cells.desired_definition: Count of distinct dedicated emergency departments under 42 CFR 489.24(b), including qualifying on-campus and off-campus departments or facilities, within one approved current product-system roster and common period
